recommendations.title: No leads in pipeline
recommendations.description: data/leads/scored_leads.json is empty or missing. The scraper pipeline has not produced results.
recommendations.action: Run the lead scraper pipeline: trigger `.github/workflows/lead_scraper.yml` or run `npm run score` locally.

recommendations.title: Email outreach not fully configured
recommendations.description: outreach/outreach_engine.js contains TODO markers for nodemailer configuration.
recommendations.action: Configure SMTP credentials and complete nodemailer setup in outreach/outreach_engine.js.

recommendations.title: Limited test coverage
recommendations.description: Only 2 test file(s) found in tests/. Scraper, outreach, and enrichment modules lack tests.
recommendations.action: Add test files for outreach_engine.js, google_maps_scraper.js, and enrichment agents.
